# Discounts

Operations related to discounts. Discounts support percentage or fixed-amount discounts, and coupon codes.

## Operations At A Glance

| Method | Path | Summary | Auth |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/coupons` | List coupons. | Bearer token required |
| `POST` | `/discounts` | Create discount. | Bearer token required |
| `DELETE` | `/discounts/{discount_id}` | Delete discount. | Bearer token required |
| `DELETE` | `/orders/{order}/discounts/{discount}` | Delete order discount. | Bearer token required |
| `POST` | `/promotion-codes/redeem/{discountedType}/{discounted}` | Redeem promotion code. | Public |
| `POST` | `/refunds/{orderPayment}` | Refund order payment. | Bearer token required |

## `GET /coupons`

List coupons.

List coupons.

- Operation ID: `get-coupons`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
- Related schemas: `ApiError403`, `ApiError404`, `ApiError500`, `ApiFail422`, `CouponCollection`

### Parameters

| Name | In | Required | Schema | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `filter[search]` | `query` | No | string (uuid) | Return coupons that have a name matching this field. |
| `include` | `query` | No | string | Comma separated list of optional data to include in the response. |
| `sort` | `query` | No | string | Comma separated list of fields used for sorting. Placing a minus symbol in front of a field name sorts in descending order. Defaults to `-created_at`. |
| `per_page` | `query` | No | string | The number of items per page. Defaults to 25. |
| `page` | `query` | No | string | The requested page. Defaults to 1. |

### Request Body

None.

### Responses

| Status | Description | Content |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `200` | CouponCollection | `application/json`: `CouponCollection` |
| `403` | ApiError403 | `application/json`: `ApiError403` |
| `404` | ApiError404 | `application/json`: `ApiError404` |
| `422` | ApiFail422 | `application/json`: `ApiFail422` |
| `500` | ApiError500 | `application/json`: `ApiError500` |
